caption: A man wearing a pink t-shirt and dark shorts plays basketball in an indoor gym featuring blue bleachers, a blue wall, and a polished court with green and black painted sections. He begins by dribbling a basketball with his left hand while moving across the court. He then leaps high into the air, holding the ball aloft with his right arm extended. As he descends, he throws the ball toward the basketball hoop. In the final sequence, the ball flies through the air toward the rim while the man lands on his feet and watches the shot. The gym is equipped with a standard basketball hoop and backboard, and the lighting is bright and overhead. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
